property.name: jobOperation
property.label: Job Operation
property.description: The job operation name that matches the job config custom metadata.

property.name: jobQueueFields
property.label: Job Queue Group Fields
property.description: Job Queue Group table fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: jobQueueStatuses
property.label: Job Queue Group Statuses
property.description: Semi-colon separated list of Job Queue Group Statuses to show in the table.

property.name: jobQueueTableMaxHeight
property.label: Job Queue Group Table Max Height
property.description: Job Queue Group Table Max Height

property.name: studyUnitFields
property.label: Study Unit Fields
property.description: Semi-colon separated list of Study Unit fields for the selection screen.

property.name: studyOfferingFields
property.label: Study Offering Fields
property.description: Semi-colon separated list of Study Offering fields for the study offering selection screen.

property.name: studyOfferingStatuses
property.label: Study Offering Statuses
property.description: Semi-colon separated list of study offering statuses used to filter the study units and study offerings displayed in the table.
property.default: Draft;Not Started;Pre-enrollment Opened;Enrollment Opened;Enrollment Closed;Running (Enrollment Opened);Running;Completed

property.name: studyOfferingTableMaximumRowNumber
property.label: Study Offering Table Maximum Row Number
property.description: Study Offering Table Maximum Row Number

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.
